titleStmt.title: SII 4.943: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 943. (A.R. No. 126 of 1893). ON A PILLAR IN THE LAKSMI-NARAYANA TEMPLE AT AVANIGADDA, DIVI TALUK, KISTNA DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkamaniyyuṁḍu puṇyaślōkuṁ ḍa
dhaḥkritavilāsasuravibhuṁḍu jitā
mitrānīkuṁḍu yaśaśrīkaruṇḍuvelanāṁṭi goṁkkanṛ
pasiṁhuṁḍilanu [. 1*]
dhāruṇi naṭṭi goṁkkavasudhāvibhu na
nvayabhrityuṁḍaina kollūrivibhuṁḍu
śau¨ryyaguṇa moppaṁgaṁ jiṁtama
nāyakuṁḍu dējōramaṇiyyuṁḍu
paḍase susthiralīla veluṁgaṁgāṁbrati
hāripadā[¨rttha] mādyamuna nāravitā
raka śāsanaṁbugān [. 2*] Ātaniki vikasi
tāṁbhōjātānana guṁḍamakunu janmiṁce ja
gatkhyātuṁḍu muttamanāyakuṁ ḍāta
tatējuṁḍu nāyakābharaṇuṁḍai [. 3*] kaliyu
gaśūdrakuṁ ḍana jagaṁbuna vīraguṇaprasi
ddhuṁḍai velasinayaṭṭi muttanaku mada
nāṁggi sumadhya puṇyadōhaḷiyana noppu
mēḍamaku nabhyudayaṁbugaṁ buṭṭe naṁbujōjva
ladalalōlanētri madasāmajayāna latāsuma
llikāmilitasuganthi gommamana meruvadānyama
hītalaṁbunan® [. 4*] śakava¨rṣamulu 1076 Agu
nēṁṭi śrāvaṇa śuddhaikādaśiyu guravāramuna
śridhanadavrōlicōḍanārāyaṇadēvara
kuṁ baḍihāri muttināyakuni kūṁ
tuṟu kommama danaku dha¨rmmuvugā na
khaṁḍadīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina birudu
gadyalu 16 vīniṁ jēkoni kaṁḍla brahma
na koḍku muttaya dana putrānupautrika
mu nitya māneṁḍu neyi Ācaṁdrā¨rkamu
naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu . śrīśrī likitakāpacāri .
Digital edition of SII 4.943 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
